description: GlobalSMTPConfig configures global SMTP parameters. See https://prometheus.io/docs/alerting/latest/configuration/#configuration-file

authIdentity.description: authIdentity represents SMTP Auth using PLAIN

authPassword.description: authPassword represents SMTP Auth using LOGIN and PLAIN.

authSecret.description: authSecret represents SMTP Auth using CRAM-MD5.

authUsername.description: authUsername represents SMTP Auth using CRAM-MD5, LOGIN and PLAIN. If empty, Alertmanager doesn't authenticate to the SMTP server.

forceImplicitTLS.description: forceImplicitTLS defines whether to force use of implicit TLS (direct TLS connection) for better security. true: force use of implicit TLS (direct TLS connection on any port) false: force disable implicit TLS (use explicit TLS/STARTTLS if required) nil (default): auto-detect based on port (465=implicit, other=explicit) for backward compatibility It requires Alertmanager >= v0.31.0.

from.description: from defines the default SMTP From header field.

hello.description: hello defines the default hostname to identify to the SMTP server.

requireTLS.description: requireTLS defines the default SMTP TLS requirement. Note that Go does not support unencrypted connections to remote SMTP endpoints.

smartHost.description: smartHost defines the default SMTP smarthost used for sending emails.

tlsConfig.description: tlsConfig defines the default TLS configuration for SMTP receivers
